title: Worker Report
description: Machine-readable handover document produced by the implementer subagent after completing a micro-task. Written to docs/worker-reports/{feature-id}/TASK-{N}.json. Lifespan: VERSION — deleted on Version Release.

task_id.description: Task identifier matching PLAN.md micro-task label. Example: TASK-1, TASK-2a.

feature_id.description: Feature identifier matching the feature folder name. Format: {id}-{name}. Example: auth-login, dashboard-main.

status.description: Task completion status. Use 'blocked' only when the blocker cannot be resolved without human decision.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the task was completed. Example: 2026-03-19T10:30:00Z.

files_modified.description: List of all source files created, modified, or deleted during this task.

path.description: Relative path from project root. Example: src/components/LoginForm.tsx

description.description: One-line plain-text summary of what changed in this file.

escalation_note.description: Tier 3 only: what was tried, why cannot proceed. null if not escalated.

concerns_logged.description: IDs of CONCERN-*.md files this task created or actively worked around. Read docs/concerns/*.md before implementing. Always populate this field — empty array if none.

expected_interface.description: Contract exposed to the next worker that will consume this task's output. Required for all tasks that produce callable code (components, functions, APIs).

component_name.description: Primary identifier of the exported item. Example: LoginForm, useAuth.

props.description: Key-value map of prop/parameter names to their types. Values use TypeScript-like type strings.

exports.description: All named exports from this module. Used by the next worker to import correctly.

api_endpoints.description: API routes or endpoints created or modified. Empty array if no API work was done.

outstanding_bugs.description: Bugs discovered during implementation that were not fixed. Never omit known bugs — list them here so the next worker is warned.

severity.description: Impact level. high = blocks functionality, medium = degrades UX, low = cosmetic.

description.description: Plain-text description of the bug behavior.

location.description: File path with line number if known. Example: src/auth/tokenRefresh.ts:45.

workaround.description: Optional temporary workaround for the next worker. Example: Refresh page manually.

dependencies_introduced.description: New npm/pip packages or internal modules added. Used by the next worker to install before running.

reason.example: Schema validation for API request bodies

unit_tests.description: Paths to unit test files created. May be empty.

integration_tests.description: Paths to integration or E2E test files created. May be empty.

handoff_notes.description: Optional plain-text notes for the next worker. Keep concise. One to three sentences max. Use this for non-machine-readable context like environment variables, feature flags, or cross-cutting concerns.

deviations_from_plan.description: Changes made during execution that differ from what was planned in PLAN.md. Required — always be honest about deviations.

files_modified.description: Login form with email/password fields, validation, and error display
Authentication hook exposing login(), logout(), and user state

examples.handoff_notes: Auth token stored in localStorage under key 'auth_token'. The API coder must include a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Token refresh logic is NOT implemented — see spec.md.

files_modified.description: Login endpoint stub — returns mock token, real DB integration pending

outstanding_bugs.description: Login endpoint uses mock token — password verification not implemented
outstanding_bugs.workaround: Use the mock token directly for testing

examples.handoff_notes: BLOCKED: waiting for user decision on DB ORM choice (Prisma vs Drizzle). Until resolved, this endpoint returns a hardcoded mock token.

deviations_from_plan.planned: Full JWT auth with password hashing and DB lookup
deviations_from_plan.reason: DB ORM decision pending from user
